subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Sovereign, the True One, the Manifest Justice. This is a Day wherein is seen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین المقربین علیک بهاء الله الملک الحق العدل المبین هذا یوم فیه یری من
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
